mano_cua.result_summary: ng-select组件配置了placeholder文本'Select item'（视觉上显示在div.ng-placeholder中），但内部input元素未设置aria-placeholder属性。DevTools Accessibility面板确认aria-placeholder: Not specified。辅助技术无法读取占位符信息，属无障碍访问缺陷。
mano_cua.last_reasoning: DevTools Accessibility panel clearly shows aria-placeholder: Not specified for the ng-select input element. The component has visual placeholder 'Select item' in <div class='ng-placeholder'> but the inner <input> lacks aria-placeholder attribute. ARIA Attributes section only contains: aria-autocomplete, role, aria-expanded, aria-activedescendant, aria-controls - no aria-placeholder.
